text: I am surrounded by glass and polished concrete, the setting sterile and orderly, as if awaiting meaning to be brought into it. Moving into the second scene, enveloped by the vivid display of R+D, my senses awaken to a playful confusion. Explanatory text blurs with aesthetic, and I feel simultaneously like a subject and an observer—curious, unsettled, yet oddly comforted by the openness to assemble meaning after the fact. Here, uncertainty becomes a gentle companion.
